title: 500 error when signing in with Google
symptom: Users encounter a 500 error screen when attempting to log in to their WeWeb account using Google. This issue arises unexpectedly after previously successful logins.
applies_when: Attempting to sign in with Google
not_this_if: Using a different login method (e.g., email/password)
root_cause: The error occurred due to a sudden change in how Google provides user profile pictures, which affected the login process. This change was made without prior notice, leading to the 500 error during authentication.
fix_steps: Wait for the WeWeb team to implement a fix for the Google login issue
Attempt to log in again after the fix is applied
agent_instruction: Monitor the WeWeb updates for a fix to the Google login issue and try logging in again afterward.
